title: Better MC (Cheese Edition)
description: A Minecraft modpack focusing on performance and graphics enhancements
body:
# ****Note: This version has no affiliation with [Better MC (BMC)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/better-mc-fabric-bmc3), so the stylistic approach of our modpack may differ significantly from theirs

### **Expect crashes if you use those versions Since this is a beta version, there are many unstable phenomena, which is normal.**

It's a less powerful but optimized bundle where you can have straightforward enjoyment, and you have the flexibility to customize its components. However, being a beta version, it might not be as impressive as [Better MC], but it's good enough for individuals.
This mod pack is different from others because it primarily focuses on aesthetics, leisure, and large-scale building experiences. It emphasizes frame rate optimization and compatibility.
Version 1.21 | Vanilla+ Experience With The Player in Mind | A New Era of Better MC 1.21.1!

✔️ Frequent updates with new features
✔️ Completely overhauled world generation (Terralith, Tectonic, Geophilic)
✔️ Fully optimized with shader support (Sodium, iris)
✔️ Hundreds of new dungeons and structures (Moog's Voyager Structures, Repurposed Structures)
✔️ Better vanilla mobs, such as (Random Shulker Colours, Savage Ender Dragon, etc.)
✔️ Quality of Life (QoL) features for a seamless experience (Better Villages, Macaw series, etc.)
✔️ Lower game configuration and significantly enhanced optimization
✔️ Many custom features to improve the experience
✔️ Over 450 mods
✔️ Mobile-friendly (FCL, Zalith Launcher [You need to use a renderer that supports Sodium])
